extortion.description: About Soethoudt Metaalbewerking B.V. history Soethoudt Metaalbewerking is a renowned, modern company that specializes in the manufacture of high-quality precision parts, mainly based on machining techniques. From 1870, Soethoudt Metaalbewerking was established in Oudenbosch. Over the years, a high degree of professional knowledge and experience has been gained. Product in the current production process, CNC-controlled machining centers, turning and milling machines are used, among other things. We also work with a number of conventional drilling, turning and milling machines. soethoudt.nl
